finding_results.notes: Court work now occurs on Thursday, which is explicitly listed as a court day; Wednesday remains no-impact home mobility only.
Weekly rest day is now consistently Saturday across negotiation, posted schedule, and late-night calendar tension, matching the chapter boundary handoff.
After deletion, the scene now imposes an explicit relational cost: Anika enforces the written consequence and cancels Friday court, with pushback and forced acknowledgment.
Chapter now opens on external institutional pressure at the clinic and moves into terms-setting without repeating a domestic recap scaffold before conflict framing.

summary: Chapter 12 was restructured to open externally, continuity was reconciled around court/rest day logic, and the deletion aftermath now carries explicit interpersonal consequence before routine transition.
